## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Refactor / tech debt
- [ ] Documentation / config only

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run build` passes for all affected workspaces
- [ ] New/changed service methods have unit tests
- [ ] New/changed endpoints have E2E tests and Swagger `@ApiOperation` annotations
- [ ] Schema changes include a new migration file in `api/schema/` and an updated baseline
- [ ] No hard-coded secrets or credentials
- [ ] Snyk scan passes (no new high/critical vulnerabilities)
